dashboard.title: Hello, {{name}}
dashboard.subtitle: Track the essentials of your household finances from one secure workspace.
dashboard.placeholder: Use this space for balances, latest transactions, billing reminders, or the first actions you want a signed-in user to take.
dashboard.next_steps_copy: Budget summaries, account cards, recurring bills, and recent activity all fit naturally into this authenticated shell.
dashboard.name: Name
dashboard.security_copy: Your login requires a second verification step before granting access to the application.

app_shell.workspace_copy: Use the sidebar to move through your private area. Add more protected routes here as the application grows.

layout.title: Secure access for every family account.
layout.subtitle: A clear split-screen layout for signing in and validating codes before entering the app.
layout.feature_copy: Keep the brand and context visible on one side while forms stay focused and easy to complete on the other.

login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your family finances.
login.security_hint: Your session is secured with Laravel Sanctum token authentication.

errors.password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.too_many_attempts: Too many login attempts. Please try again in a moment.
errors.unexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again.

validate_code.title: Validate your access code
validate_code.subtitle: You are signed in as {{email}}. Enter the verification code to continue.
validate_code.sent_to: We sent the verification code to {{email}}.

errors.unexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again.
